title: Song of the Poison Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: Petra must bond with a poison-breathing hydra to save the king! 🐍

q.en: Who is the newest Dragon Master to arrive at the castle?
q.zh: 来到城堡的最新一位驯龙师是谁？

options.en: Heru according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 赫鲁（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Petra is an eight-year-old girl from the southern lands, chosen by the Dragon Stone to care for the hydra.
explain.zh: 佩特拉是一个来自南方之地、八岁的女孩，被龙石块选中去照料海德拉龙。

q.en: What is Petra afraid of at the beginning of the story?
q.zh: 在故事开头，佩特拉害怕什么？

options.en: Reading books according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 读书（按书中另一种说法）
她那条四头、会喷毒的海德拉龙

explain.en: Petra is terrified of her dragon because it has four heads and shoots poison, and she admits her fear to Drake.
explain.zh: 佩特拉很怕她的龙，因为它有四个头还会喷毒，她还把恐惧告诉了德雷克。

q.en: What happens to King Roland in the courtyard?
q.zh: 在庭院里，罗兰国王发生了什么事？

options.en: He laughs at the dragons according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他被龙逗笑了（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The hydra's poison mist makes him sick and he falls down
options.zh: 海德拉龙的毒雾让他中毒倒下
他给海德拉龙取了名字

explain.en: When the hydra gets nervous and sprays a light mist, King Roland breathes it in, his skin turns green, and he collapses.
explain.zh: 海德拉龙受惊喷出薄雾，国王吸入后皮肤变绿、倒地不起。

q.en: Why do the villagers turn against the dragons?
q.zh: 村民们为什么会反对那些龙？

options.en: They are afraid after the king is poisoned and want the dragons sent away
options.zh: 国王中毒后他们很害怕，想把龙送走

options.en: They want the dragons as pets according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 他们想把龙当宠物（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: Believing the dragons are dangerous, the villagers chant 'Send the dragons away!' and demand they be locked up far off.
explain.zh: 村民们认为龙很危险，高喊“把龙送走！”，要求把它们关到远方。

q.en: How is Petra's ancestor Cosmo connected to dragons?
q.zh: 佩特拉的祖先科斯莫和龙有什么关系？

options.zh: 他曾驯服过一条四头龙

options.en: He wrote the dragon books according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他写了关于龙的书（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Petra says a family member named Cosmo was a dragon expert who even tamed a four-headed dragon and kept it as a pet.
explain.zh: 佩特拉说祖先科斯莫是个龙专家，曾驯服过一条四头龙并把它当宠物养。

q.en: How does the hydra heal Drake after he is poisoned by the green mist?
q.zh: 德雷克被绿色毒雾毒倒后，海德拉龙怎样治好了他？

options.en: Gives him a potion according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 给他药水（按书中另一种说法）
唱了一首美妙动听的歌

explain.en: All four of the hydra's heads raise up and sing different tones that blend together, and the green color leaves Drake's skin.
explain.zh: 海德拉龙四个头一起仰起，唱出不同却交融的音调，德雷克皮肤上的绿色便褪去了。

q.en: What makes Petra finally connect with the hydra?
q.zh: 是什么让佩特拉终于和海德拉龙建立了连接？

options.en: Her Dragon Stone glows and she hears the hydra's four voices
options.zh: 她的龙石块发光，她听见了海德拉龙的四个声音

options.en: A magic spell from Griffith according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 格里菲斯施的咒语（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: After Drake is poisoned and Petra cries, her Dragon Stone glows bright green and she hears four voices telling her the hydra can help.
explain.zh: 德雷克中毒、佩特拉落泪后，她的龙石块亮起深绿光，她听见四个声音说海德拉龙能帮忙。

q.en: What name does Petra give her hydra?
q.zh: 佩特拉给她的海德拉龙取了什么名字？

explain.en: Petra names the hydra Zera, after her kitten back home, because the dragon also purrs when it is happy.
explain.zh: 佩特拉以家乡小猫的名字给海德拉龙取名泽拉，因为龙开心时也会像猫一样发出呼噜声。

q.en: How do the Dragon Masters travel to the king's bedroom to heal him?
q.zh: 驯龙师们是怎样去国王卧室为他治病的？

options.en: Worm teleports them with his green light
options.zh: 沃姆用绿光把他们传送过去

options.en: They fly on Kepri according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他们骑凯普里飞过去（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Drake, Petra, and the hydra all touch Worm, whose body glows green and flashes them straight to King Roland's bedroom.
explain.zh: 德雷克、佩特拉和海德拉龙都触碰沃姆，沃姆身体发绿光，一闪就把他们送到了国王卧室。

q.en: Who returns at the end with news that the prime Dragon Stone is dying?
q.zh: 故事结尾是谁回来报信说主龙石块正在衰亡？

options.en: Heru and his Moon Dragon Wati
options.zh: 赫鲁和他的月亮龙瓦蒂

options.en: Emperor Song according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 宋皇帝（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Heru lands on Wati and tells Griffith that the prime Dragon Stone, from which all others come, is dying and they must help.
explain.zh: 赫鲁骑着瓦蒂降落，告诉格里菲斯：所有龙石块都来自的主龙石块正在衰亡，必须去帮忙。
